name: fourth-firecrawl
description: Fourth-tailored fork of the Firecrawl Claude plugin, rebuilt MCP-first for Claude Cowork. Task-oriented skills for competitor intel, hospitality market scans, content gap analysis, and staged KB ingestion into Fourth Marketing Brain. Bundles curated source catalogs (R365, HCM, NRN, FSR, Skift) and extraction schemas. Uses your Cowork-registered Firecrawl connector — per-user keys, no shared secrets.
